messages.content:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

{"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "833f4ddb-ad07-44ae-9ce1-92c403d8f94e", "article_id": "891d35df-f121-4745-9f3c-4f52a411d57a", "source_name": "The Zoe Report", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "brand_ambassador_mention", "brand": "Tiffany & Co.", "person": "Anya Taylor-Joy", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["Taylor-Joy finished the look with white gold diamond rings from Tiffany & Co. (she's a global ambassador for the jeweler)", "As a bona fide fashion darling (and current Dior ambassador)"], "anchor_json": {"ambassador_status": "confirmed for both", "brand": "Tiffany & Co.", "person": "Anya Taylor-Joy"}}, {"event_frame_id": "c9591733-ef3d-40d5-92ad-0f882edaa8bd", "article_id": "b6d178aa-f480-4f43-a83f-da34b58b6d2b", "source_name": "WWD", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "celebrity_wearing_brand", "brand": "Tiffany & Co.", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["She completed the ensemble with Tiffany & Co. jewelry, including its pearl earrings and two silver knot rings"], "anchor_json": {"event_date": "2019-09-03", "event_location": "Tokyo", "event_context": "Super Mario Galaxy photocall press tour", "brand": "Tiffany & Co."}}, {"event_frame_id": "f15c3cbe-d70a-421a-b882-47ae6152da43", "article_id": "891d35df-f121-4745-9f3c-4f52a411d57a", "source_name": "The Zoe Report", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "celebrity_red_carpet_appearance", "brand": "", "person": "Anya Taylor-Joy", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["On March 26, Anya Taylor-Joy landed in Tokyo to promote \"The Super Mario Galaxy Movie,\" wearing a Princess Peach-inspired pink look complete with a super-sized hat.", "the Dune 2 actor landed on the red carpet wearing a dusty pink bespoke two-piece set from Jacquemus' Le Palmier show"], "anchor_json": {"key_garment": "oversized hat", "color_theme": "pink", "inspiration": "Princess Peach character", "person": "Anya Taylor-Joy"}}]}
